creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Good point. Another problem is vm-bhyve misleading about qemu-tools (package got renamed) and it is also fixed in -devel branch. 
I also strongly encourage you to test and give feedback about my pull request removing dependency on genisoimage[1].
 
1. https://github.com/churchers/vm-bhyve/pull/545
